items.claim: Chase Hooper's chin is starting to deteriorate.
items.quote: His chin is starting to go.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is highly susceptible to being hit.
items.quote: you're so damn hittable and you've always been.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez is a heavy hitter.
items.quote: I think that he's a pretty heavy hitter.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has had a full training camp for this fight.
items.quote: he's not taking this fight on short notice, so he's had a full camp.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan has a significant reach advantage over Alberto Montes.
Alberto Montes is a more technical striker than Tommy McMillan.
items.quote: I actually think that he's a better striker than McMillan.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan leaves many defensive openings during his fights.
Tabatha Ricci is not an elite-level grappler.
items.quote: I thought Ricci was this accomplished black belt. Apparently not

items.claim: Fatima Kline possesses superior physicality and grappling compared to Tabatha Ricci.
items.quote: that physicality, her relentlessness, how good she is on the mat.

items.claim: Jose Delgado is a high-volume striker who utilizes knees and elbows.
items.quote: He's long for the weight class, big knees, elbows, punches in bunches, insane volume.

items.claim: Austin Bashi is an elite-level grappler.
